rows.name:
An ingredient I've never heard
of!! Is it an Iiran specialty!?
Good broth, maybe. I'm interested!

rows.label: qst701707_msg0003
rows.name:
...Eh, not an ingredient?
A scary organization??

rows.label: qst701707_msg0004
rows.name:
Hmm, then you should ask an expert
in that field. You know, someone
who knows the underworld...
